seoTitle: Eagle Bay vs East Augusta — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eagle Bay and East Augusta. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eagle Bay vs East Augusta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eagle Bay and East Augusta.
heading: Eagle Bay vs East Augusta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eagle Bay, Western Australia and East Augusta, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Augusta has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Eagle Bay (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eagle Bay or East Augusta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eagle Bay has a flood risk score of 55/100, while East Augusta scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eagle Bay scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. East Augusta scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eagle Bay or East Augusta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Augusta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
